name: stripe-create-customer
description: Create a new customer record in Stripe. Use as the first node in payment automation workflows before creating subscriptions or checkout sessions. Supports {{key}} template interpolation so upstream node output (e.g. email from a sign-up webhook) can be passed directly.

API_KEY_SECRET.description: Vault path to the Stripe secret key (e.g. 'stripe/secret_key').

EMAIL.description: Customer email address. Supports {{key}} template interpolation.

NAME.description: Customer full name. Supports {{key}} template interpolation.

PHONE.description: Customer phone number in E.164 format (e.g. '+15555555555').

DESCRIPTION.description: Internal description for this customer. Not visible to the customer.

METADATA.description: JSON object of key-value metadata to attach (e.g. '{"user_id": "usr_123"}').

setup_instructions.title: Store your Stripe secret key
setup_instructions.detail: In Talos Secrets, store your Stripe secret key (sk_live_... or sk_test_...) at the path in API_KEY_SECRET (e.g. 'stripe/secret_key').

setup_instructions.title: Typical workflow pattern
setup_instructions.detail: Chain: [webhook or trigger] → [stripe-create-customer: EMAIL={{email}}] → [stripe-create-subscription: CUSTOMER_ID={{customer_id}}]. Store the returned customer_id for subsequent Stripe operations.
